description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build_conduit_gcc that triggers on pull requests to the develop branch. The workflow should have two ubuntu-22.04 jobs: build_basic and build_basic_pyvenv. Both jobs should install system dependencies, checkout the repository with submodules, display environment information, build TPLs, configure Conduit, build Conduit, install Conduit, and check the installation. The build_basic job builds Conduit with GCC, while the build_basic_pyvenv job builds Conduit with GCC and a Python virtual environment.
